title: Codereview pass 3: Python OSCORE seqnum - style and docs
description:
Review of code style and documentation for sender_sequence_number overflow fix.

**Findings:**
- Docstring properly updated with Raises section per Google style
- SECURITY: prefix used per CLAUDE.md guidelines for security-critical code
- Comment explains what MAX_SEQNO is (2^40-1) and why
- Import alphabetization maintained in aiocoap.oscore imports
- Test file imports also properly organized

**Status:** Style and documentation are appropriate.
